productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Solid Grey Jackets
description: Composition Grey melange reversible jacket made of 100% cotton Grey shell side has long sleeves with ribbed sleeves, hoodie with plaid design, zippered closure on the front, patch pockets on the sides of the front closure with openings on the sides, overlocked stitch detailing and ribbed hemline Reverse side has blue, white and black plaid check design, long sleeves with grey ribbed cuffs, zippered closure trimmed in grey melange, insert pockets on the sides of the zipper with grey melange trimming on the pocket opening, embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest and grey ribbed hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Warm and rugged is the perfect way to describe this grey melange and plaid check hooded jacket from status quo. The overlock stitch detailing over the melange grey fabric brings in a masculine edge, while the reversible plaid side is one big bold dash of blue. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with t-shirts and jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in jackets Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
